title: Cobblemon: Eldoria's Fakemon
description: Addon for Cobblemon that adds fakemon
body:
This addon adds new Fakemon Regional Forms for existing Cobblemon and Fakemon.\
The Starter Cobblemon forms evolve from the regular starters on lvl 36 through item-based evolutions and each has its own custom signature move.

### How to install the Datapack Version

Download the .zip file and add it in **both** "resourcepacks" folder and "datapacks" folder of your world. 

## Added Fakemon [Wiki](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/18rEeo4zj9LO28KNMthYzbavs4rD-yViSOlBsg9PK75k)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Version 1.0
\
• **Meganium Eldorian** - Grass|Steel\
• **Sceptile Eldorian** - Grass|Fire\
• **Samurott Eldorian** - Water|Fighting

• **Dragonite Eldorian** - Dragon|Water\
• **Tauros Eldorian** - Normal|Ghost\
• **Heracross Eldorian** - Bug|Dragon

• **Scorchamp** - Electric|Fire - Dex Num: 7775\
• **Glimmerdash** - Fairy|Ground - Dex Num: 7776\
• **Comice** - Electric - Dex Num: 7777

</details>

## Usage Permissions:
- Not allowed for commercial purposes.
- Allowed to use on free-to-play servers.
- Allowed to include in modpacks.
- Allowed for content creation (videos, streams, screenshots, tutorials).
